calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Relief Under Ccp 473
Off Calendar Aug-28-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Court Call:
Ian Kelly, Esq., 415-581-0885, appearing for Jessica Shaefer, Plaintiff.

Hearing held. Mr. Kelly stated that he spoke to Mr. Bravo last night, that Mr. Bravo called him this morning and reported that he is unable to appear via court call, that Mr. Bravo requested that Mr. Kelly appear before him and reported that Mr. Bravo would like a continuance. The Court stated that the relief requested is madatory.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's Motion for Relief under CCP 473(b) is GRANTED. Plaintiff to properly seek entry of judgment by no later than September 30, 2020. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2020 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
